selected_nodes.text: Audrey's dogs go crazy for Fetch and Frisbee at the park and love meeting other pups.

selected_nodes.text: Audrey enjoys checking out new parks with her four dogs and spending time with them.

selected_nodes.text: Audrey meets up with other dog owners once a week for tips and playdates for the dogs.

selected_nodes.text: Audrey's dogs love running around the park, but dislike snow and prefer sunny days in the grass.
